subcodes.title: Du’a’i laylati nisfi sha’ban
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou hast nurtured me throughout numbered days, wherein Thou didst cause me to traverse the depths of Thy love and made me witness lightning glimpses of the radiance of Thy Face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم و قد ربیتنی ایاماً معدوده حیث قد سیرتنی فی لجج محبتک و شاهدتنی لحظات انوار وجهتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for evening; night, @justice and wrath of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
